title_header: GOD OF THE HIGH SCHOOL THE MATCH WITH GODS CHAPTER 1 STORY/DRAWING BY YONGJE PARK EPISODE 3 ASSISTED BY MADE IN KOREA

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Are YOU LEARNING SWORDSMANSHIP JUST TO SHOW OFF? ANYWAY YOU'RE SO CLUMSY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: 17-YEAR-OLD MINSEO SEO. CURRENTLY THE BEST FIGHTER IN MY SCHOOL;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Are YOU READY For Some CHEESINESS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN FRIEND
dialogue.line: YOU SCORED HIGH ENOUGH TO BE IN THE NATION'S TOP 100 ON THE MOCK EXAMS: YOU HAVE A NICE BODY AND PRETTY FACE

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU BASTARD! YOU ATE MY LUNCH, DIDN'T YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN FRIEND
dialogue.line: BOYFRIEND IS A MEATHEAD WHO ONLY KNOWS HOW TO FIGHT; HE RECENTLY BECAME THE BEST IDIOT FIGHTER AFTER KNOCKING DOWN THE BOSS OF DONGPA HIGH SCHOOL;

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN FRIEND
dialogue.line: DAILY TIDDLE SCHOOL, YOU HAD A ONE-SIDED CRUSH ON THE LEADER OF THE STUDENT COUNCIL; ~AND NOT TOO LONG AGO, YOU CHASED AFTER THE LEADER OF THE JUDO CLUB_ BUT NOW YOU ENDED UP WITH THE BEST FIGHTER IN SCHOOL;. HOW COME YOU ONLY PICK AND CHOOSE GUYS BASED ON THEIR STRENGTH?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AH; CAUSE BEING STRONG IS SO COOL!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN ANT
dialogue.line: LOOK AT WHAT WE HAVE HERE; YOU TWO WANNA GET A ROOM?

dialogue.speaker: MUSIK CHOI
dialogue.line: I OWE YOU ONE FOR LAST TIME; MINSEO SEO

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN ANT
dialogue.line: HA. ARE YOU GUYS FILMING A DRAMA OR SOMETHING?

dialogue.speaker: MINSEO SEO
dialogue.line: SHUT UP! BRING IT ON! YOU DIRTY BASTARDS!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN PROT
dialogue.line: AH; LOOKS LIKE I DREW A LOSING TICKET AGAIN;

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN ANT
dialogue.line: IF YOU'RE SO STRONG_ YOU SHOULD BE ABLE TO TAKE ON 20 GUYS!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN ANT
dialogue.line: AH! WHERE'S YOUR FIGHTING SPIRIT?! HUH?! WHY ARE YOU STRUGGLING SO MUCH WITH THESE SMALL WIMPS?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ZOMBIE BIKERS, A TRIO FROM DONGPA HIGH [AKA TRIPLE AVENGERS] *HARD TO BELIEVE, BUT THEY'RE TEENAGERS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MY DAUGHTER, MIRA; IN ORDER TO REESTABLISH THE "YOO FAMILY MOONLIGHT SWORD STYLE," YOU MUST FIND A GOOD SEED.

dialogue.speaker: ZOMBIE BIKER
dialogue.line: BLECH! COUGH REMEMBER MUST FIND; COUGH GOOD SEED;

dialogue.speaker: ZOMBIE BIKER
dialogue.line: AH; DID I CHOOSE DEAD BRAIN, NOT SEED?

dialogue.speaker: MIRA YOO
dialogue.line: IT'S ANNOYING TO FIGHT ONE BY ONE; BRING IT ON!

dialogue.speaker: MIRA YOO
dialogue.line: IT WOULD BE A WASTE IF I USED IT ON YOU WIMPS

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: YOO'S FAMILY BARE HAND STYLE 1ST DANCE: FALCON

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MS, MIRA YOO, THE 25TH SUCCESSOR OF THE MOONLIGHT SWORD STYLE; YOU'RE QUALIFIED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE G.O.H;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SWORDSMANSHIP GENIUS MIRA YOO (AGE 17) CONFIRMS HER PARTICIPATION IN THE G.O.H,

dialogue.speaker: MIRA YOO
dialogue.line: ONLY TO FIND GOOD SEED! AS IF! IT'S TO MAINTAIN THE MOONLIGHT SWORD STYLE!!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MEANWHILE, THE ZOMBIES ARE STILL DANCING,

dialogue.speaker: ZOMBIE BIKER
dialogue.line: HOW MUCH LONGER DO WE HAVE TO DO THIS, BOUNCE BOUNCE

dialogue.speaker: ZOMBIE BIKER
dialogue.line: HOW MANY TIMES DID SHE HIT US?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND, DEAD BRAIN; ONE HURT, POOR SOUL;"

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MUCH REAL FULL-FLEDGED ACTION ROMANCE COMIC

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HOW CAN YOU DRAW FEMALE CHARACTER LIKE THAT FROM THE START?!

summary: Minseo Seo, a top fighter, is introduced while a friend comments on her strange dating preferences. Later, Minseo and Mira Yoo are confronted by a gang, leading to a fight where Mira showcases her Moonlight Sword Style, easily defeating the gang and qualifying for the G.O.H.
